note: DT-002: The solid-js JSX compilation in bun test was the biggest friction point. bun's classic JSX transform emits React.createElement(...) even with importSource=solid-js set. Required a global `React` shim in happydom.ts. Also, CJS module chains bypass mock.module system when require() is used instead of import(). Fixed by using async ESM import in mock factories. Significant effort spent on test infrastructure debugging rather than test content.
